templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://miaou.com/pages/stockists

templates.name: Phone Support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you?

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at zoe@miaou.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/miaou/ and FB here: https://web.facebook.com/Miaouxxx/

templates.name: Cancel/Edit Order
templates.content: I'm afraid we are unable to edit or cancel any orders. Apologies for the inconvenience.

templates.name: Size Guide / Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Check out our sizing guide here: https://miaou.com/pages/size-guides for your reference, and if you're still unsure, let me know.

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at contact@miaou.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Shipping Time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 to 2 days and we usually ship via UPS and DHL. Once shipped, it will take 3 to 5 days for domestic orders, and 5 to 10 days for international orders.

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://miaou.com/pages/faqs

templates.name: Sustainability
templates.content:
Sustainability is a core part of our identity. You can read more about our commitment to sustainability and our various initiatives here: https://miaou.com/pages/code-of-ethics.
If you're more of a visual learner, we also put together this video on Tik Tok: https://www.tiktok.com/@shopmiaou/video/7125479752047119659?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7130342922852222507 about our sustainability efforts, if you'd like to give it a watch.

templates.name: Where To Return - International
templates.content:
To submit your return, please do so here: https://web.global-e.com/returns/portal/oQfL. All you'll need is your order number and email address.
Please note though that we don't cover the cost to return items back to our facility. International returns can take up to 2-4 weeks to deliver to our facility. Our full refund policy can be found here: https://miaou.com/pages/faqs

templates.name: Missing Package - Route Purchased
templates.content: I'm so sorry to hear your order hasn't arrived safely! As you have purchased Route Protect for your order, you'll need to file a claim directly with Route here: https://route.com Route will then be in touch with all updates regarding your order claim.

templates.name: Sale - Price Adjustment
templates.content: During our sales promo, price adjustments are only allowed while the sale is still active and the item has not been delivered. I'm afraid we're unable to make price adjustments for previous purchases or provide a price match. Please note that all sale items are final sale and cannot be returned.

templates.name: Promo Code - Error
templates.content: We're so sorry to hear there's an issue with your promo code. Can you kindly reply with your email address, promo code and the name(s) of the item(s) you're wanting to purchase? Our team will be glad to look into this for you.

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $250. Maybe you can add something else to reach the min?

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at contact@miaou.com Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Military / first responder discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://miaou.com/collections/sale

templates.name: What happened with your rewards / referral program?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we do not offer our Rewards anymore. We apologize for the inconvenience!

templates.name: Can you retroactively apply a promo/discount code to my order?
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address, and the code you'd like to apply?

templates.name: Size Chart: Women - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our women's size chart here: https://miaou.com/pages/size-guide

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://miaou.com/collections/private-sale
